channel.title: ALL LIST - MORAGS DAILY PODCASTS
channel.description: Morag's daily podcast feed - AI Daily Brief, Nate B Jones, and MoPods originals
channel.itunes:author: Morag

item.title: [AIDB] AI's Great Divergence
item.description: Stanford's new AI Index and PwC's annual AI performance study reveal a widening gap between AI experts and the public, and between corporate leaders capturing 75% of AI's economic gains.

item.title: [NBJ] The Real Problem With AI Agents Nobody's Talking About
item.description: What's really happening inside the OpenClaw phenomenon when 250,000 GitHub stars later the most consequential AI agent framework emerges.

item.title: [AIDB] Vibe Coding Gets an Upgrade
item.description: A wave of updates across Claude Code, Lovable, and Google AI Studio shows how fast agentic coding tools are converging and why enterprise hardening of vibe coding may be one of the biggest building opportunities.

item.title: [AIDB] AI Populism Turns Violent
item.description: AI policy meets real-world volatility as protests target tech companies and governments struggle with AI governance frameworks.

item.title: [NBJ] 3 Model Drops. $15M/Day in Burn. One Product Dead. Nobody Connected Them.
item.description: What's really happening underneath the March 2026 headlines when everyone was watching model drops.
